headline: Uranium Stock Rises Near Buy Point. AI Fuels Nuclear Earnings.
summary: Nuclear stocks Vistra and Energy Fuels reported strong earnings and outlook Thursday. Vistra stock rose above a key level while uranium stock Energy Fuels surged near a buy point after more than doubling revenue, but pared gains.

headline: Nuclear Stock Vistra Pops On Earnings But Uranium Producer Soars
